phrases.intent_en: Ask where to board a harbour boat tour
phrases.text_local: Où prend-on le bateau pour la promenade en mer ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo prahn-TOHN luh bah-TOH poor lah proh-muh-NAD ahn MEHR
phrases.cultural_note: Short harbour boat trips depart from the Vieux Bassin quayside.

responses.english: At the quay, just over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to board a harbour boat tour
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on embarquer pour une promenade en bateau dans le bassin ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ahm-bar-KAY poor oon prohm-NAHD ahn bah-TOH dahn luh bah-SAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Short boat tours of the old harbour and the Seine estuary depart from the quayside. They are especially popular at high tide when the reflections of the colourful houses in the water are most vivid.

responses.english: At the quay, just over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best time to photograph the reflections
phrases.text_local: À quel moment de la journée les reflets dans le bassin sont-ils les plus beaux ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel moh-MAHN duh lah zhoor-NAY lay ruh-FLAY dahn luh bah-SAHN sohn-teel lay ploo BOH
phrases.cultural_note: The famous reflections of the Quai Sainte-Catherine in the harbour water are best at dawn or early evening when the light is warm and lateral. At midday, direct overhead sun flattens the colours.

responses.phonetic: TOH luh mah-TEHN, kahn seh KALM
responses.french: Tôt le matin, quand c'est calme.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a restaurant recommendation on the quay
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous recommander un restaurant sur le quai ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo ruh-koh-mahn-DAY uhn res-toh-RAHN soor luh KEH
phrases.cultural_note: The quayside restaurants around the Vieux Bassin serve fresh seafood and traditional Norman cuisine.

responses.english: Try that one, the seafood is good.
responses.phonetic: eh-seh-YAY suh-LWEE-LAH, lay FRWEE duh MEHR sohn BOHN
responses.french: Essayez celui-là, les fruits de mer sont bons.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about seafood restaurants on the quay
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander un restaurant de fruits de mer sur le quai ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY uhn res-toh-RAHN duh FRWEE duh MAIR soor luh KAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Quai Sainte-Catherine is lined with seafood restaurants. Look for freshly caught sole normande, moules marinières, and plateaux de fruits de mer. Prices are higher here than in side streets but the harbour view is unmatched.

responses.english: There are several on the quay.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah ploo-ZYUHR soor luh KEH
responses.french: Il y en a plusieurs sur le quai.
